testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-audit > exports the audit SDK client token through the public entrypoint
@stynx-web/angular-audit > resolves the configured audit client from Angular injection
@stynx-web/angular-audit > wraps the pinned audit event and integrity endpoints
@stynx-web/angular-audit > omits empty list query options and URL-encodes path segments
@stynx-web/angular-audit > wires the host-facing provider into Angular dependency injection
@stynx-web/angular-audit > uses empty audit options when a host only provides a client factory
@stynx-web/angular-audit > exposes a defensive audit route factory
@stynx-web/angular-audit E.6 components > renders the audit log, applies filters, and advances cursor-backed pages
@stynx-web/angular-audit E.6 components > renders detail payloads and verifies event integrity on demand
@stynx-web/angular-audit E.6 components > surfaces integrity verification failures without destructive remediation
@stynx-web/angular-audit E.6 components > renders per-entity history with cursor pagination and per-event integrity badges
@stynx-web/angular-audit E.6 components > renders hash integrity badge tones for valid, broken, and unchecked states
